_comment: Claude Code MCP config (the 'shallow'/MCP half — same for all hosts). Place at your project root as .mcp.json (or merge into it). Replace the absolute path with your checkout. run-proxy.sh launches `harness mcp-gateway` over the self-contained mock JIRA, so the governed gateway is the ONLY JIRA server the agent sees. For the 'deep'/native half (governing Bash/Edit/web), also merge hosts/claude-code.settings.json. Set TAINT=tainted in run-proxy.sh's env to demo the taint floor severing the comment write.
